case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. LISETTE PATZAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PATZAN, LISETTE
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (TRANSACTION ID # 63561520) FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION D/B/A ELAN FINANCIAL SERVICES

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT RULED ON PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT/ CLAIMANT LISETTE PATZAN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ALL OF THE WAGES HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL ALSO PAY $100 PER PAY PERIOD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE CLERK SHALL SERVE THE ORDER ON ALL PARTIES, INCLUDING A CERTIFIED COPY TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT OF LOS ANGELES COUNTY WHO IS HOLDING THE FUNDS. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steve levy, Esq. of the Law Offices of Steve Levy, T:800.637.6922, for plaintiff and opposing party, by Court Call;
Lisette Patzan, defendant/ judgment debtor/ claimant.

RULING: Hearing held. Plaintiff is asking for $300 per pay period to be withheld from defendant's wages; defendant is offering to pay $100 per pay period. After hearing, the Court ruled on PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION as follows:

Defendant/ Claimant Lisette Patzan's claim of exemption is denied. The levying officer is directed to release all of the wages held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. The judgment debtor shall also pay $100 per pay period.

Order signed in open court.

The clerk shall serve the order on all parties, including a certified copy to the Sheriff's Department of Los Angeles County who is holding the funds.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
